channel.title: One Pot Quick
channel.description: One-pot recipes that taste amazing. Less cleanup, more flavor.

item.title: One-Pot Creamy Tuscan Chicken Pasta
item.description: Creamy Tuscan chicken pasta in one pot, 25 minutes. No draining, minimal cleanup.

item.title: One-Pot Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta
item.description: One-Pot Lemon Garlic Shrimp Pasta. Linguine cooked directly in a lemon-garlic broth with shrimp added in the last 3 minutes. Bright, fa

item.title: One-Pot Chicken Burrito Bowl
item.description: One-Pot Chicken Burrito Bowl. Rice, seasoned chicken, black beans, corn, and salsa — all cooked together in one pot. The rice abso

item.title: One-Pot Chicken and Rice
item.description: One-Pot Chicken and Rice. Seasoned chicken thighs on a bed of rice. Chicken fat drips into the rice as it cooks, adding flavor

item.title: One-Pot Beef Chili
item.description: One-Pot Beef Chili. Thick, hearty chili in one pot. Ground beef, beans, tomatoes, and warm spices.

item.title: One-Pot Creamy Mushroom Pasta
item.description: One-Pot Creamy Mushroom Pasta. Pasta in creamy mushroom sauce, one pot. Mushrooms release liquid into the pasta water, adding depth

item.title: One-Pot Coconut Lentil Soup
item.description: One-Pot Coconut Lentil Soup. Red lentils in coconut milk with warming spices. Red lentils break down completely during cooking, c

item.title: One-Pot Sausage Peppers Pasta
item.description: One-Pot Sausage Peppers Pasta. Italian sausage, peppers, and rigatoni in tomato sauce. Sausage fat flavors the entire dish.

item.title: One-Pot Tomato Basil Soup
item.description: One-Pot Tomato Basil Soup. Creamy tomato soup made entirely in one pot with canned tomatoes. No blender needed — crush the toma

item.title: One-Pot Cajun Shrimp and Grits
item.description: One-Pot Cajun Shrimp and Grits. Creamy grits topped with spiced shrimp in a buttery sauce. The grits cook in the same pot, absorbing

item.title: One-Pot Spanish Chickpea Stew
item.description: One-Pot Spanish Chickpea Stew. Chickpeas simmered with chorizo, tomatoes, and spinach in a smoky paprika broth. A hearty one-pot me

item.title: One-Pot Mac and Cheese
item.description: One-Pot Mac and Cheese. Elbow pasta cooked directly in milk, which transforms into a creamy cheese sauce as the starch relea

item.title: One-Pot Thai Peanut Noodles
item.description: One-Pot Thai Peanut Noodles. Rice noodles in a creamy peanut-lime sauce with vegetables. Everything cooks together — noodles soft

item.title: One-Pot Cacio e Pepe
item.description: One-Pot Cacio e Pepe. Silky Roman cheese and pepper pasta made in one pot with just 6 ingredients in 20 minutes.

item.title: One-Pot Pesto Chicken Pasta
item.description: One-Pot Pesto Chicken Pasta. Creamy basil pesto, tender chicken, and penne cooked together in 30 minutes.

item.title: One-Pot Vodka Rigatoni
item.description: One-Pot Vodka Rigatoni. Creamy pink tomato vodka sauce with rigatoni, all in one pot in 30 minutes.

item.title: One-Pot Spinach Ricotta Pasta
item.description: One-Pot Spinach Ricotta Pasta. Creamy ricotta, wilted spinach, and lemon in a light one-pot pasta ready in 23 minutes.
